content.problemStatement:
At ShareChat, there are are plenty of interesting problems to solve. Here is one of them.

Given integers AAA, BBB and NNN, you should calculate the GCD of AN+BNA^N + B^NAN+BN and ‚à£A‚àíB‚à£|A - B|‚à£A‚àíB‚à£. (Assume that GCD(0,a)=aGCD(0, a) = aGCD(0,a)=a for any positive integer aaa). Since this number could be very large, compute it modulo 100000000710000000071000000007 (109+710^9 + 7109+7).
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains three space-separated integers AAA, BBB and NNN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ‚Äî the required GCD modulo 109+710^9 + 7109+7.
